_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your own values. config.json is gitignored so your API key and criteria never get committed.
_comment_columns: Map these to your spreadsheet's actual column headers (case-insensitive). Address is optional but improves match accuracy.
_comment_eligibility: EXAMPLE CRITERIA BELOW. These are placeholder values to show the shape of the config — replace every list and threshold with your own organization's actual rules before using this tool. See README.md and PROMPTS.md for how to adapt evaluate_donor() in fec_donor_lookup.py to match.

special_state.description: Example: a state with stricter local rules (e.g. a state where your campaign is running) gets its own tier below. Set code to '' to disable this path entirely and treat every donor the same way.

standard_path.description: Applies to every donor not covered by special_state above.
